goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'el shaddai'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'star of the hotel'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'london kings cross'.
The train should 'leave after 11:45' and should leave on 'saturday'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called el shaddai
Make sure you get phone number and star of the hotel
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should depart from london kings cross
The train should leave after 11:45 and should leave on saturday
Make sure you get arrival time
